title: Paspalidium pradanum

taxonomy: Paspalidium pradanum is classified within the family Poaceae, commonly known as grasses. It belongs to the tribe Paniceae, a group of grasses that are often tall and slender. Further, Paspalidium pradanum is placed within the genus Paspalidium, which consists of various species of grasses found in tropical and subtropical regions. At the higher taxonomic level, Paspalidium pradanum is a type of monocot, characterized by having one cotyledon in its seedling stage. This classification helps to organize and understand the plant's evolutionary relationships and characteristics.
